title: Modern Keybind Handling
description: Modern keybind handling from versions release 1.12+ backported to b1.7.3. Makes keys re-register when closing a GUI.
body:
Keybind handling from versions 1.12+ backported to b1.7.3. Makes keys re-register when closing a GUI.

Client-side mod, meaning it doesn't have to be installed on the server to work.
